title: Regularized logistic stacker on two raw probabilities
summary: Use only RealMLP core probability and CatBoost probability in a strongly regularized stacker.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Build a LogisticRegression stacker with C=0.05 using exactly two OOF features: p_realmlp_core and p_catboost. Train stacker only on true OOF predictions and apply to test prediction columns. Do not add rank features or calibration.
expected_effect: Learn a simple correction curve while avoiding a large meta-model.
risk: Even a two-column stacker can overfit OOF and hurt public.
